title: Scary Creepers
description: Makes mobs scared of exploding creepers!
body:
## Scary Creepers!

This is a simple (server-side) mod that returns an old beta feature of Minecraft that was removed due to performance reasons. Surely the mob AI system and modern hardware are good enough to handle it now! Mobs will now *__attempt__* to run away from exploding creepers.

# Warning: WIP!

This mod is mostly a work in progress, so don't expect it to be perfect. I'll optimize and improve this mod if people show actual interest in this mod.

# Configuration

This mod is configured via gamerules.

`/gamerule SC_modEnabled`: toggles the mod globally.

`/gamerule SC_reactionTimeTicks`: decides how quickly the mods react to the creepers. Creepers take 30 ticks to explode, by default mobs will wait 5 ticks before trying to escape the creeper.

`/gamerule SC_runSpeed`: How fast the mobs will run from the creeper.

`/gamerule SC_fleeDistance`: How far away the mob will try to get from the creeper / in what range it detects the creeper.

# Contact

If you want to contact me about anything regarding the mod (e.g suggestions / feature requests, bug reports, translations, etc.), join the discord linked, or just DM me `@tektonikal`
